summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Email Notification System, Calendar Page new fields, and Interview Prep dialog fix. Backend tests: 100% pass (13/13). Frontend UI testing confirmed all new features are working correctly.

minor.issue: No GET single event endpoint exists - only PUT, DELETE, and POST /test-reminder
minor.note: Not blocking - events can be retrieved via GET /api/calendar list endpoint

Interview Prep Page UI - loads correctly

Notification logs are stored in database
interview_type dropdown with options: HR, Technical, Managerial, Final, Other
meeting_link input field for Zoom/Meet/Teams URLs
job_application_id dropdown to link events to applications
